member.name: T:SharpGuard.Cli.CliOptions
member.summary: Parsed command-line options for the SharpGuard analysis command.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Cli.CliOptions.Path
member.summary: Path to .sln, .csproj, or directory to analyze.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Cli.CliOptions.Output
member.summary: Optional output file path. If null, writes to stdout.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Cli.CliOptions.SeverityThreshold
member.summary: Minimum severity to report. Findings below this threshold are filtered out.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Cli.CliOptions.Offline
member.summary: If true, skip SCA network calls and use cache only.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Cli.CliOptions.FailOnFindings
member.summary: If true, exit code 1 when any findings are present above the threshold.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Cli.Models.AnalysisResult
member.summary: Complete result of a security analysis run.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Cli.Models.AnalysisResult.SastFindings
member.summary: All SAST findings discovered during analysis.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Cli.Models.AnalysisResult.Success
member.summary: True if the analysis completed without critical errors.

member.name: P:SharpGuard.Cli.Models.AnalysisResult.ErrorMessage
member.summary: Error message if the analysis failed.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Cli.Program
member.summary: SharpGuard CLI — entry point for the standalone security analysis tool.

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Cli.Program.Main(System.String[])
member.summary: Main entry point. Parses command-line arguments and runs the analysis.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Cli.Services.AnalysisOrchestrator
member.summary: Orchestrates SAST and SCA analysis. Opens the solution/project via MSBuildWorkspace (with an AdhocWorkspace fallback when MSBuild is not available), runs all Core rules against each compilation, then invokes the SCA engine.

member.name: T:SharpGuard.Cli.Services.IAnalysisOrchestrator
member.summary: Orchestrates the full security analysis workflow (SAST + SCA).

member.name: M:SharpGuard.Cli.Services.IAnalysisOrchestrator.AnalyzeAsync(SharpGuard.Cli.CliOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Runs the complete analysis with the given options.
